rationale: Romania's government formation remains the dominant domestic story; Liberal former mayor nominated as PM is a continuation of last cycle's development with no new confidence vote yet.

top_events.title: Romanian president picks Liberal former mayor as PM
top_events.summary: The nomination is confirmed but the confidence vote is still pending — political uncertainty continues to affect Romania's governance and EU fund absorption capacity.

top_events.title: US-Iran deal: conflicting signals on Sunday signing
top_events.summary: A potential Iran deal could ease energy costs for Romanian households and industry. No resolution yet — continuation of uncertainty with modest indirect relevance.

top_events.title: Israel attacks Beirut; Hezbollah ceasefire violation alleged
top_events.summary: Renewed Lebanon escalation near Black Sea region's broader neighborhood adds marginal security noise, but no direct impact on Romania.
